bias.description: generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches in-process rather than decoding the public TLC Parquet files
does not build CDF packages, receipts, manifests, contract verdicts, or checkpoint state
uses DuckDB C Arrow data-chunk conversion directly to isolate binding wrapper overhead; not a production destination path

reference.name: duckdb_arrow_data_chunk_append
reference.semantic_work: materializes synthetic TLC-shaped Arrow batches into a persistent DuckDB table through DuckDB C Arrow data-chunk append with _cdf_row_key and checkpoint; omits CDF source, package, receipt, and checkpoint work
